silhouette_language: Turned tabletop game pieces and boards: smooth round discs and a flat gridded board with a raised rim; clean rounded forms, no rough organic irregularity or greebles.
vision_style_brief: A warm fantasy tabletop set: an aged-honey-oak board with a dark forged-iron grid and rim; the playing pieces are polished near-black obsidian and warm pearl-white stone, reading clearly as dark vs light under candlelight. NOT: rough weathered stone pieces, sci-fi materials, saturated primary colors.
anti_style: rough weathered or cobbled stone game pieces
sci-fi or brushed-metal sheen on the discs
saturated primary colors covering large areas
